title: French Galette with Caramelized Dates
description: Sweet and savory galette filled with caramelized dates and gooey goodness.
instructions: Roll out French galette dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
In a pan, caramelize dates over medium heat until sticky and fragrant.
Spread caramelized dates over the center of the dough, leaving a 1-inch border.
Fold the edges of the dough over the filling, pressing gently to seal.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the crust is golden brown.
Serve warm, dust with powdered sugar if desired.
